# Commands and keybindings --- included from elot.org

This chapter is auto-generated by =make manual-reference=.  Do not
edit by hand; edit the docstrings in the source instead.

# AUTO-GENERATED-BEGIN
| Command | Key | Description |
|---------+-----+-------------|
| =elot-describe-curie-at-point= | == | Pop up a *Help* buffer describing CURIE at point (or prompt). |
| =elot-flymake-setup= | == | Enable the ELOT Flymake backend in the current buffer. |
| =elot-global-label-display-mode= | == | Display labels from ELOT active label sources in any buffer. |
| =elot-global-label-display-setup= | == | One-shot: (re)build the DB-driven font-lock regexp in this buffer. |
| =elot-headings-from-table= | == | Convert the Org table at point to an ELOT outline. |
| =elot-label-activate-source= | == | Activate (SOURCE DATA-SOURCE) in `elot-active-label-sources'. |
| =elot-label-active-sources-add= | == | Activate a registered source in the origin buffer. |
| =elot-label-active-sources-mode= | == | Major mode for reordering `elot-active-label-sources'. |
| =elot-label-active-sources-move-down= | == | Move the entry at point one position down (toward lower priority). |
| =elot-label-active-sources-move-up= | == | Move the entry at point one position up (toward higher priority). |
| =elot-label-active-sources-persist= | == | Persist the origin buffer's `elot-active-label-sources' to `.dir-locals.el'. |
| =elot-label-active-sources-refresh= | == | Re-read the origin buffer's active sources and redraw. |
| =elot-label-active-sources-remove= | == | Remove the entry at point from `elot-active-label-sources'. |
| =elot-label-deactivate-source= | == | Remove (SOURCE DATA-SOURCE) from `elot-active-label-sources'. |
| =elot-label-display-setup= | == | Read identifier-label pairs and initialise label-display. |
| =elot-label-list-active-sources= | == | Display a tabulated buffer for reordering `elot-active-label-sources'. |
| =elot-label-list-sources= | == | Display a tabulated list of all registered ELOT label sources. |
| =elot-label-list-sources-refresh= | == | Rebuild the *ELOT Label Sources* buffer from the DB. |
| =elot-label-list-sources-refresh-entry= | == | Force-refresh the source at point. |
| =elot-label-list-sources-unregister-entry= | == | Unregister the source at point. |
| =elot-label-lookup= | =C-c C-x r= | Interactive lookup of resource identifier, with completion. |
| =elot-label-lookup-external= | == | Run `elot-label-lookup' pinned to scope `external'. |
| =elot-label-lookup-local= | == | Run `elot-label-lookup' pinned to scope `local'. |
| =elot-label-move-source-down= | == | Move (SOURCE DATA-SOURCE) one position down (toward lower priority). |
| =elot-label-move-source-up= | == | Move (SOURCE DATA-SOURCE) one position up (toward higher priority). |
| =elot-label-refresh-all-sources= | == | Refresh every registered source, continuing past individual failures. |
| =elot-label-refresh-source= | == | Force a re-parse of SOURCE (optionally scoped to DATA-SOURCE). |
| =elot-label-register-current-buffer= | == | Register the file visited by the current buffer as a label source. |
| =elot-label-register-source= | == | Register SOURCE (a file path) in the ELOT label cache. |
| =elot-label-set-active-sources= | == | Replace `elot-active-label-sources' with ENTRIES. |
| =elot-label-sources-mode= | == | Major mode for listing registered ELOT label sources. |
| =elot-label-unregister-source= | == | Remove SOURCE (optionally scoped to DATA-SOURCE) from the DB. |
| =elot-menu= | == | ELOT Ontology Authoring Menu |
| =elot-mode= | == | Minor mode for authoring OWL ontologies in Org-mode with ELOT. |
| =elot-open-owl= | == | Open an OWL ontology from OWL-SOURCE by converting with `elot-exporter'. |
| =elot-org-lint= | == | Refresh `elot-slurp', then do `org-lint' |
| =elot-tangle-buffer-to-omn= | == | Update hierarchy and export OMN for all ontologies to their tangle targets. |
| =elot-toggle-label-display= | == | Toggle between showing identifier or rdfs:label, using `elot-label-display'. |
| =elot-update-headline-hierarchy= | == | Update `elot-headline-hierarchy' from the current org buffer. |
# AUTO-GENERATED-END
